Create a section of a report call Medical Chronology

Create a section summarizing each medical visit. Use ## for visit date heading (MM/DD/YYYY format).
Include the following fields: **Facility Name:**, **Provider Name:**, **Diagnoses:**, **Plan:**
Only include a visit if both Facility Name and Provider Name are present.
Add Source References at the end of each visit.
Do not include any information that is not in the source documents.
